critic_justifications.NY Times: Critic praised the play's innovative structure and Will Butler's original songs as electrifying and immersive.
critic_justifications.Variety: Review highlighted the Tony-winning drama's compelling narrative about artistic creation and the chemistry of the ensemble cast.
critic_justifications.Hollywood Reporter: Critic commended the production's technical sophistication and the way it captures the energy of 1970s rock recording.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Review called it a vibrant, engaging drama with strong performances and memorable original music.
critic_justifications.The Guardian: Critic praised the play's ambitious scope and its successful blend of drama with rock authenticity.
critic_justifications.Vulture: Review noted the show's theatrical innovation and strong audience connection to the material.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been strongly positive with A-range ratings reflecting enthusiasm for the original music and storytelling.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Community ratings show high approval with audiences praising the immersive theatrical experience.
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Audience reviews consistently highlight the show's originality and emotional resonance.
